items.title: 烧光5000亿后，京东方开始给股民赚钱
items.content_html:
烧光5000亿后，京东方开始给股民赚钱

BOE Technology, a major player in the display industry, has seen its stock price hit a high since 2009 after years of heavy capital expenditure. The recent rally is driven by a new strategic partnership with Corning focused on advanced semiconductor packaging.

京东方在经历了多年重资产投入后，凭借与康宁在玻璃基封装等领域的合作，股价创下2009年以来新高。此次业务转型使其有望突破传统面板行业的估值局限，进入新的增长平台。

Tags: boe · stock · semiconductor

items.title: 咖啡局网站
items.content_html:
[分享创造] 咖啡局网站

This is a simple website created for people to schedule coffee meetups and facilitate casual networking. It offers a convenient platform for users to connect and chat in person.

这是一个旨在方便大家在线预约咖啡局进行交流的网站。用户可以通过该平台轻松约见他人，分享沟通。

Tags: social · networking · coffee

items.title: 投资、炒股知识如何系统的学习
items.content_html:
[投资] 投资、炒股知识如何系统的学习

An investor with over a decade of experience in ETFs seeks advice on how to systematically improve stock market knowledge. They are looking for suggestions on learning paths and potential professional certifications to enhance their financial literacy.

一名资深ETF投资者寻求系统性学习炒股知识的方法。他希望通过专业学习或考证，提升自己的理财能力和投资水平。

Tags: investing · stocks · finance

items.title: Anavex生命科学：随着Blarcamesine显示出前景，正在等待验证
items.content_html:
Anavex Life Sciences: Waiting On Validation As Blarcamesine Shows Some Promise

Anavex Life Sciences is currently under scrutiny as its drug candidate Blarcamesine shows some potential clinical promise. Investors and stakeholders are waiting for further validation of its efficacy.

Anavex生命科学公司的候选药物Blarcamesine表现出一定临床前景。目前市场和投资者正密切关注该药物后续的验证结果。

Tags: biotech · anavex · healthcare

items.title: 最近有什么质量、性价比不错的手机吗
items.content_html:
[问与答] 最近有什么质量、性价比不错的手机吗，手机摔坏得换了

The user is looking for recommendations for a new smartphone within the budget of 1,500 to 3,500 RMB. Their previous phone screen broke, and they prefer a cost-effective replacement rather than a repair.

用户因旧手机碎屏且维修成本过高，计划在1500至3500元预算内购买新款手机。目前正在寻求高性价比的手机推荐。

Tags: smartphone · recommendation · consumer

items.title: 男士剃须泡沫 老铁们都使用哪个品牌的？
items.content_html:
[问与答] 男士剃须泡沫 老铁们都使用哪个品牌的？

This is an inquiry asking for recommendations on quality shaving foam brands for men. Users are exchanging experiences and preferences for personal grooming products.

这是一个关于男士剃须泡沫品牌的咨询贴。网友们分享了各自使用过且体验较好的产品品牌。

Tags: grooming · shopping · lifestyle

items.title: 当这个罕见信号闪烁时，股市出现熊市的可能性为67%
items.content_html:
There’s a 67% chance stocks will suffer a bear market when this rare signal flashes — like it’s doing now

Market analysts warn that a rare technical signal is flashing, historically linked to a 67% chance of a bear market. The divergence between the Dow Industrials and the Nasdaq is cited as a significant concern.

市场分析显示，一个罕见的技术信号正在闪烁，历史上该信号与67%的熊市概率相关。道琼斯工业指数与纳斯达克的表现背离被视为潜在的市场风险。

Tags: stocks · bearmarket · analysis

items.title: Blue Owl Capital：以25%的折扣提供11.5%的收益率
items.content_html:
Blue Owl Capital: 11.5% Yield At A 25% Discount

Blue Owl Capital is currently highlighted for its attractive 11.5% yield and a significant 25% discount to net asset value. Analysts are evaluating the potential value for income-focused investors.

Blue Owl Capital目前因其11.5%的收益率及25%的资产净值折扣受到关注。分析人士正在评估该投资标的对寻求收益型投资者的价值。

Tags: investment · blueowl · yield

items.title: Apogee Enterprises：对冲AI投资组合风险
items.content_html:
Apogee Enterprises: Hedge Against AI Portfolio Risk

Apogee Enterprises is suggested as a hedging tool for investors looking to mitigate risks associated with heavy AI-focused portfolios. The company offers a defensive position against volatility in the tech sector.

Apogee Enterprises被视为对冲AI投资组合风险的潜在工具。其业务特点为投资者提供了一个应对科技板块波动的防御性配置选择。

Tags: ai · hedging · finance

items.title: 用codex做了个代理软件
items.content_html:
[宽带症候群] 用 codex 做了个代理软件

A developer has built a lightweight proxy tool using Go, supporting various protocols like VLESS and Trojan. The project features local, client, and server modes with automated configuration generation.

开发者使用Go语言构建了一款轻量级代理软件，支持多种协议及灵活的部署模式。该项目还包含配置生成功能，旨在简化网络代理的使用体验。

Tags: proxy · go · networking

items.title: Postal Realty Trust：收益率可靠，但低价买入窗口可能已关闭
items.content_html:
Postal Realty Trust: Reliable 4.2% Yield, But Bargain Window Is Likely Closed (Rating Downgrade)

Postal Realty Trust continues to offer a reliable 4.2% yield, but analysts suggest the opportunity to buy at a bargain price has likely passed. The rating for the stock has been downgraded accordingly.

Postal Realty Trust目前收益率依然稳健，但分析师认为低价买入的窗口期已经关闭。因此，该股票的评级已被下调。

Tags: reit · stocks · finance

items.title: 康卡斯特一分为二
items.content_html:
Comcast is splitting in two

Comcast plans to split into two separate publicly traded companies to isolate its media business. The core broadband and wireless brand will remain under the Comcast name.

康卡斯特宣布将拆分为两家独立上市公司，以剥离其媒体业务。核心的宽带和无线品牌将继续沿用康卡斯特名称。

Tags: comcast · business · media

items.title: 美元树：多价格策略见效，但客流量仍需改善
items.content_html:
Dollar Tree: Multi-Price Is Working, But Traffic Still Needs To Turn

Dollar Tree's transition to a multi-price strategy is yielding positive results for the company. However, overall store traffic remains a key metric that needs to show improvement.

美元树的多价格策略已初见成效，公司业绩有所好转。尽管如此，提升门店客流量仍然是公司面临的主要挑战。

Tags: retail · dollartree · finance

items.title: 芯片交易变得像白银一样——来自摩根士丹利威尔逊的警告
items.content_html:
How the chip trade has come to resemble silver — a warning from Morgan Stanley’s Wilson

Wall Street strategist Mike Wilson warns investors against sticking to popular momentum chip trades. He suggests that these trades now carry risks similar to historical commodity spikes.

华尔街策略师迈克·威尔逊提醒投资者警惕芯片板块的过热动量交易。他指出，这些交易目前已蕴含类似大宗商品暴涨后的风险。

Tags: stocks · chips · wallstreet

items.title: 氪星晚报：百度OCR模型登顶四榜；中国移动设立Token办
items.content_html:
氪星晚报｜百度OCR模型Unlimited OCR在HuggingFace、GitHub四榜登顶；国务院印发《教育发展“十五五”规划》；美国养老金即将被动调仓，300亿美元卖盘“已在路上”

Baidu's OCR model has topped four major benchmarks, and China Mobile has confirmed the establishment of a dedicated Token department. Meanwhile, international expansion for various Chinese tech and retail firms continues.

百度OCR模型近日在四个榜单登顶，中国移动则确认成立Token办公室以统筹相关业务。此外，多家中国企业正持续推进全球化布局。

Tags: baidu · chinamobile · tech

items.title: 反“觉醒”运动可能终结美国科学界
items.content_html:
The war against ‘woke’ could end US science as we know it

A controversial proposal from the Office of Management and Budget regarding federal financial assistance could disrupt scientific research in the US. Critics warn that the policy could restrict academic freedom and scientific progress.

美国管理和预算办公室提出的一项联邦资助规则改革引发担忧，可能对科学研究产生负面影响。评论认为这或将限制学术自由并阻碍科技进步。

Tags: science · policy · usa

items.title: 自研全域柔性电子皮肤，Moxy摸喜发布首款AI陪伴机器人
items.content_html:
自研全域柔性电子皮肤，Moxy摸喜发布首款AI陪伴机器人｜最前线

Moxy has launched an AI companion robot that utilizes innovative flexible electronic skin for tactile interaction. Unlike voice-controlled devices, it focuses on physical touch to simulate emotional responses.

Moxy发布了一款搭载柔性电子皮肤的AI陪伴机器人。该产品主打触觉交互，通过模拟真实触感提供情感陪伴，区别于传统的语音驱动设备。

Tags: ai · robotics · tech

items.title: 苹果转向中国存储芯片是否无法解决科技巨头的微芯片危机
items.content_html:
Why Apple pivoting to China for memory may not solve big tech’s microchip crisis

Apple is exploring memory chip procurement from Chinese suppliers to address shortages. However, analysts remain skeptical about whether this will significantly impact the dominance of current industry leaders.

苹果公司正寻求从中国供应商处采购存储芯片以缓解短缺。然而，市场分析认为此举未必能撼动现有行业巨头的市场主导地位。

Tags: apple · chips · supplychain

items.title: 派评：近期值得关注的App
items.content_html:
派评 | 近期值得关注的 App

This article provides a curated list of interesting and useful applications for users to explore. It covers a variety of tools that enhance productivity and digital experience.

items.title: Pollen公司试图删除文章，谷歌曾提供协助
items.content_html:
Pollen (CEO Negus-Fancey, CTO Wright) tried to remove article, and Google helped

A report suggests that Pollen's leadership attempted to have an article removed, with Google allegedly providing assistance in the process. This raises questions about content control and platform influence.

有报道称Pollen公司曾试图删除一篇负面文章，并得到了谷歌的协助。此事引发了关于平台内容控制与影响力的讨论。

Tags: google · internet · controversy

items.title: 巴基斯坦袭击导致阿富汗数十人死亡
items.content_html:
Pakistani strikes kill dozens in Afghanistan

Conflict between Pakistan and Afghanistan has escalated after recent strikes, causing dozens of casualties. While the Taliban claims civilians were killed, Pakistan asserts it targeted militants.

巴基斯坦与阿富汗之间的冲突近期升级，空袭导致数十人死亡。塔利班称受害者为平民，而巴方则坚称其打击目标是武装分子。

Tags: geopolitics · conflict · afghanistan

items.title: Sand.ai获超亿美元融资，曹越：视频是通往世界模型的关键路径
items.content_html:
独家｜获超亿美元融资，Sand.ai 曹越：为什么视频是通往世界模型最重要的路径

Sand.ai, a startup focused on video generation models, has raised over $100 million. Founder Cao Yue believes video generation is the essential pathway toward developing comprehensive world models.

视频生成模型初创公司Sand.ai完成超亿美元融资。创始人曹越认为，视频生成是通往人工智能世界模型的关键路径。

Tags: ai · video · startup

items.title: 委内瑞拉母亲与新生儿从废墟中获救
items.content_html:
Mum rescued from Venezuela rubble with newborn baby tells BBC how he helped her survive

A mother and her newborn baby were rescued from rubble following devastating earthquakes in Venezuela. Their miraculous survival has become a powerful symbol of hope for the affected region.

委内瑞拉地震后，一位母亲与她的新生婴儿从废墟中奇迹获救。这一事件为受灾地区带来了希望的象征。

Tags: news · venezuela · rescue

items.title: 韩国足球教练辞职，总统呼吁调查世界杯失利
items.content_html:
South Korea football coach quits as president calls for probe into World Cup loss

The South Korean football coach has resigned following the national team's elimination from the World Cup. The country's president has demanded an investigation into the team's performance and the reasons for their early exit.

韩国队世界杯出局后，主教练宣布辞职。韩国总统已要求对球队的表现及失利原因展开调查。

Tags: sports · football · korea

items.title: 在格鲁吉亚的大地上：徒步篇
items.content_html:
在格鲁吉亚的大地上：徒步篇

This article shares a personal journey and travel guide regarding hiking in Georgia. It highlights the natural beauty and the experience of exploring the region on foot.

文章分享了在格鲁吉亚徒步旅行的个人体验与心得。作者详细介绍了当地的自然景观以及徒步过程中的真实感受。

Tags: travel · hiking · georgia

items.title: 绘制欧洲的AI劳动力机遇
items.content_html:
Mapping Europe’s AI Workforce Opportunity

OpenAI has published a new report detailing how AI might reshape the job market across the European Union. It examines which roles are likely to be automated and where new growth opportunities may emerge.

OpenAI发布报告分析了AI将如何重塑欧盟劳动力市场。报告详细探讨了哪些岗位可能被自动化，以及AI带来的新兴增长机遇。

Tags: ai · jobs · economy

items.title: 美国称与伊朗交换打击后同意停火
items.content_html:
US says it has agreed to 'stand down' after exchange of strikes with Iran

The United States and Iran have agreed to a ceasefire after a series of reciprocal strikes. Both sides accuse the other of violating previous agreements, leading to heightened regional tensions.

在一系列相互打击后，美国与伊朗达成停火协议。双方此前互相指责对方违反协议，导致地区局势一度紧张。

Tags: geopolitics · iran · usa

items.title: 加拿大是世界杯历史上被遗忘的东道主
items.content_html:
'You are Canadian heroes' - the forgotten hosts making World Cup history

Canada is making significant history in the current World Cup, potentially changing the future of the sport in the country forever. Their performance is earning them recognition as national heroes.

加拿大在本届世界杯上创造了历史。这一表现被认为将彻底改变足球运动在加拿大未来的发展轨迹，队员们也被誉为国家英雄。

Tags: sports · football · canada

items.title: 中国Z.ai宣称其网络安全模型可比肩Mythos
items.content_html:
China’s Z.ai claims it can match Mythos on cybersecurity

Zhipu AI has released GLM-5.2, which some researchers claim is competitive with Mythos in cybersecurity bug-finding tasks. This demonstrates significant progress in bridging the gap between Chinese and Western AI models.

智谱AI发布的GLM-5.2在网络安全漏洞发现任务中表现强劲，被研究者认为可比肩Mythos。这标志着中国AI模型在特定垂直领域的追赶速度显著加快。

Tags: ai · cybersecurity · glmai

items.title: Suno启动Spark孵化项目以资助独立艺术家
items.content_html:
Suno launches Spark incubator program to feed independent artists to its AI machine

Suno, an AI music generation platform, has launched the Spark incubator program. It aims to support independent artists with grants and mentorship to foster creativity within its ecosystem.

AI音乐生成平台Suno推出了Spark孵化计划。该计划旨在通过资助与导师指导，支持独立艺术家创作，丰富平台内容生态。

Tags: ai · music · art

items.title: GLM 5.2在基准测试中击败Claude
items.content_html:
GLM 5.2 beats Claude in our benchmarks

Recent benchmarks show that the GLM 5.2 model outperforms Claude in specific testing scenarios. This has triggered discussions among the tech community regarding the rapid advancement of open-weight models.

最新的基准测试显示GLM 5.2模型在某些场景下超越了Claude。这引起了科技界对开源模型进步速度的广泛讨论。

Tags: ai · benchmark · llm

items.title: HP与OpenAI建立前沿战略合作伙伴关系
items.content_html:
HP Inc. launches Frontier strategic partnership with OpenAI

HP Inc. has entered a strategic partnership with OpenAI to integrate advanced AI across its customer experiences and enterprise operations. The move aims to accelerate AI deployment in professional environments.

惠普与OpenAI达成战略合作伙伴关系，旨在将先进AI技术整合至企业运营与客户服务中，从而加速AI在专业办公环境的应用落地。

Tags: hp · openai · enterprise

items.title: 程序员纯用 Claude Code 搓了个对接飞书自动修告警的 Agent
items.content_html:
[程序员] 纯用 Claude Code 搓了个对接飞书自动修告警的 Agent

A developer created an AI agent using Claude Code to automate alarm resolution in Feishu. The agent analyzes logs, proposes solutions via cards, and executes fixes upon confirmation.

开发者利用 Claude Code 构建了一个自动处理飞书告警的 AI Agent。该工具可自动分析日志并生成处理方案，用户确认后即可执行修复。

Tags: claude · agent · feishu · automation

items.title: 本地部署 GLM-5.2 的门槛太高了，根本玩不起！
items.content_html:
[Local LLM] 本地部署 GLM-5.2 的门槛太高了，根本玩不起！

Deploying the GLM-5.2 model locally requires massive computational resources that are impractical for most users. Testing with multiple H20 GPUs failed to meet performance expectations for large-scale context handling.

本地部署 GLM-5.2 对硬件算力要求极高，普通用户难以负担。即使使用多张 H20 GPU 进行测试，也无法达到理想的上下文处理性能。

Tags: glm · llm · gpu · deployment

items.title: AI 浏览器真的效率提升大吗？大佬们说下使用经验
items.content_html:
[问与答] AI 浏览器真的效率提升大吗？大佬们说下使用经验

Users are discussing whether AI-integrated browsers offer significant efficiency gains over traditional browser plugins. The debate centers on whether these browsers provide unique value or just redundant features.

用户正在讨论 AI 浏览器相比传统插件是否真的能显著提升效率。争议焦点在于这种内置 AI 功能是提供了独特价值，还是仅仅是功能冗余。

Tags: browser · ai · efficiency

items.title: Coherent：针对计算通缩陷阱的电气化后时代 AI 数据中心架构师
items.content_html:
Coherent: Architect Of Post-Electrical AI Datacenters Against Compute Deflation Trap

Coherent focuses on architectural shifts in AI data centers to combat compute deflation. The article explores how infrastructure design must evolve to sustain value in an era of rapidly changing computing needs.

Coherent 专注于 AI 数据中心的架构变革，旨在应对计算通缩问题。文章探讨了在计算需求快速变化的时代，基础设施设计应如何演进以维持价值。

Tags: datacenter · ai · compute · investment

items.title: newtab01：一个基于书签驱动、以列表显示的新标签页 Chrome 扩展
items.content_html:
[分享创造] newtab01: 一个基于书签驱动、以列表显示的新标签页 Chrome 扩展

A Chrome extension named newtab01 provides a list-based, bookmark-driven interface for new tabs. It focuses on productivity by allowing users to manage links efficiently without visual clutter.

Chrome 扩展 newtab01 提供了一个基于书签驱动的列表式新标签页。该工具通过简洁的列表界面帮助用户高效管理链接，避免视觉干扰。

Tags: chrome · extension · productivity

items.title: 发现了一个非常好用的语音输入法，叫 SayIt
items.content_html:
[程序员] 发现了一个非常好用的语音输入法，叫 SayIt。

SayIt is an open-source voice input software for Windows that integrates Doubao and Deepseek APIs. It offers fast, accurate transcription and text refinement, filling a gap for Windows users.

SayIt 是一款开源的 Windows 语音输入软件，集成了豆包和 Deepseek API。它提供了快速准确的语音转文字与润色功能，弥补了 Windows 平台的相关空白。

Tags: windows · ai · voice · input

items.title: Fastenal：什么能证明其估值的合理性
items.content_html:
Fastenal: What Could Justify The Valuation

This article analyzes Fastenal's current stock valuation and the fundamental factors justifying its price. It examines the company's market position and growth prospects within the industrial supply sector.

文章分析了 Fastenal 目前的股票估值及其支撑价格的基本面因素。探讨了该公司在工业供应领域的市场地位和增长前景。

Tags: stock · valuation · fastenal

items.title: Granite REIT：仍低于净资产值，仍被低估
items.content_html:
Granite REIT: Still Below NAV, Still Underappreciated

Granite REIT is identified as being undervalued compared to its Net Asset Value (NAV). The report suggests that the market has not yet fully appreciated the company's real estate assets.

Granite REIT 被认为目前的股价低于其净资产值（NAV）。报告指出市场尚未充分认识到该公司的房地产资产价值。

Tags: reit · investing · nav

items.title: 股市回调比看起来更健康
items.content_html:
Stock Market Pullback Is Healthier Than It Looks

Current stock market pullbacks are analyzed as a healthy correction rather than a sign of a crash. The author argues that such movements stabilize the market in the long run.

分析称目前的股市回调是一种健康的修正，而非崩盘预兆。作者认为这种市场波动从长远来看有助于稳定市场。

items.title: Rayonier：一只独特的房地产投资信托基金，收益率 5%，上涨空间 42%
items.content_html:
Rayonier: A Unique REIT Yielding 5% With 42% Upside

A revisited explanation of the physics principle where kinetic energy is proportional to the square of velocity. The post clarifies the underlying mechanical and mathematical concepts.

Tags: 物理 · 科普 · 科学

items.content_html:
SpaceX stock is a terrible buy — what that actually means for the bull market

Analysts warn that hype-driven IPOs like SpaceX may not be profitable for short-term investors. The article discusses how such market phenomena influence broader bull market sentiment.

分析师警告称，像SpaceX这样受关注的IPO可能并不适合短线投资者。文章讨论了此类现象对牛市心理的影响。

items.content_html:
ServiceNow, Salesforce and other software stocks surge as the OpenAI threat weakens

Enterprise software stocks rallied as market concerns over OpenAI's disruption softened. Oracle, however, lagged behind due to its direct financial ties to OpenAI's infrastructure.

受OpenAI威胁减弱的影响，企业软件股票全线走强。Oracle因与OpenAI的云业务关联而表现相对逊色。

items.content_html:
Mother dies saving daughter in Venezuela earthquakes

Heartbreaking reports from Venezuela reveal that a mother died while protecting her daughter during the earthquake. The tragedy highlights the human cost of the disaster.

委内瑞拉地震中传来悲剧消息，一位母亲在保护女儿时不幸遇难。此事件揭示了这场灾难背后惨重的人道代价。

items.content_html:
Europe's deadly heatwave breaks German record and halts public events

A severe heatwave in Europe has pushed German temperatures to a record 41.3C. Public events have been halted as authorities respond to the extreme weather crisis.

items.content_html:
GitHub and UNDP team up to advance development priorities in Ghana with open source

GitHub and the UNDP are collaborating in Ghana to use open-source governance for digital reform. This partnership aims to leverage technology for sustainable development.

GitHub 与联合国开发计划署在加纳开展合作，旨在通过开源治理推动数字改革。此次伙伴关系旨在利用技术助力可持续发展。

items.title: 我因为罕见基因有100%的几率患癌
items.content_html:
I have a 100 per cent chance of getting cancer due to a rare gene

A personal account of a woman living with a rare TP53 gene variant that carries an extreme cancer risk. She discusses the anxiety and strict medical screening required for her condition.

一名女性分享了她携带罕见TP53基因变异的经历，该基因导致患癌风险极高。她讲述了长期焦虑及严格医学筛查的生活现状。

Tags: 医疗 · 基因 · 健康

items.title: 首次在洞穴壁画上发现古人类 DNA
items.content_html:
Ancient human DNA found on cave art for the first time

Researchers have identified ancient human DNA on cave walls, providing a new method to study prehistoric art. This discovery could help resolve debates regarding the artistic abilities of Neanderthals.

科学家首次在史前洞穴壁画及墙壁上提取到古人类DNA。该发现为研究史前艺术提供了新视角，或将揭开尼安德特人艺术能力的谜团。

Tags: 考古 · dna · 古人类

items.content_html:

Despite AMD's impressive 324% stock rally, there is a significant underlying risk that is not being widely discussed. This hidden danger could potentially impact the company's future performance despite its recent success.

尽管AMD的股价飙升了324%，但存在一个未被广泛讨论的重大潜在风险。这种隐藏的危险可能会影响该公司未来的表现，尽管其近期取得了成功。

items.content_html:
‘Money can make you happy’: My wife and I have no heirs, but we’re making the world a better place by giving it away

A couple without heirs is finding happiness and making a positive impact by donating their wealth to charitable causes. They believe that money can contribute to happiness and encourage others to find needs in their community to support.

一对没有子嗣的夫妇通过将财富捐赠给慈善事业来寻找幸福并产生积极影响。他们相信金钱可以带来快乐，并鼓励其他人寻找社区中的需求来支持。

items.title: 特朗普的“口头干预”掩盖了全球石油供应灾难，行业资深人士称现实可能导致油价上涨至135美元
items.content_html:
Trump ‘jawboning’ has masked a global oil-supply disaster, and the reality could mean $135 crude, says industry veteran

An industry veteran claims that President Trump's "jawboning" has masked a global oil supply crisis, and the current reality could drive crude oil prices to $135 per barrel. This suggests that market sentiment influenced by rhetoric may be obscuring fundamental supply issues.

一位行业资深人士声称，特朗普总统的“口头干预”掩盖了全球石油供应危机，而现实情况可能导致原油价格飙升至每桶135美元。这表明受言论影响的市场情绪可能掩盖了基本供应问题。

Tags: oil price · trump · global supply · market analysis

items.title: [分享发现] 两款新的跨平台桌面应用开发框架：ElectroBun & Deno Desktop
items.content_html:
[分享发现] 两款新的跨平台桌面应用开发框架： ElectroBun & Deno Desktop

Two new cross-platform desktop application development frameworks, ElectroBun and Deno Desktop, have been introduced as lighter alternatives to Electron. They aim to reduce app size and improve performance by leveraging modern JavaScript runtimes and system WebViews.

出现了两款新的跨平台桌面应用开发框架 ElectroBun 和 Deno Desktop，它们比 Electron 更轻量化。它们旨在通过利用现代 JavaScript 运行时和系统 WebView 来减小应用体积并提高性能。

Tags: desktop development · framework · electron alternatives · javascript

items.content_html:

items.title: [问与答] PC QQ 经典版发图慢，有同样问题的吗？
items.content_html:
[问与答] PC QQ 经典版用一段时间后发图极慢，有相同问题的吗？

A user is experiencing slow image sending in the classic version of PC QQ, specifically version 9.7.23.240423. Despite normal network conditions, images take a long time to send and appear delayed on mobile clients, with no apparent upload traffic.

有用户在 PC QQ 经典版（版本 9.7.23.240423）中遇到图片发送缓慢的问题。尽管网络条件正常，图片发送和在手机端显示却出现延迟，且任务管理器未显示明显的上传流量。

Tags: qq · pc software · bug report · image sending

items.title: 健康秘诀很简单：吃这种早餐，并在正确的时间锻炼
items.content_html:
The secret to wellness is simple: Eat this breakfast and work out at the right time

The key to a healthy breakfast lies more in its composition than its timing. Optimal wellness can be achieved by combining the right food choices for breakfast with a properly scheduled workout routine.

健康早餐的关键在于其构成而非进食时间。通过结合正确的早餐食物选择和适当安排的锻炼计划，可以实现最佳的健康状态。

Tags: health · breakfast · exercise · wellness

items.title: 前美联储主席艾伦·格林斯潘逝世，享年100岁
items.content_html:
Former Federal Reserve chairman Alan Greenspan dies at 100

Former Federal Reserve Chairman Alan Greenspan has passed away at the age of 100. He was a pivotal figure in American economic policy, leading the Fed for nearly two decades.

前美联储主席艾伦·格林斯潘已于100岁高龄逝世。他曾在美国经济政策中扮演关键角色，并执掌美联储近二十年。

Tags: alan greenspan · federal reserve · economics · obituary

items.title: 中国新的经济驱动力：一个伤感的玩具精灵和一个机器人警察部队
items.content_html:
China’s new economic drivers: a sad toy elf and a robot police force

Young Chinese consumers, facing stagnant wages, are reportedly spending billions on "feelings," driving new economic trends. This includes purchases of items like a "sad toy elf" and the development of a robot police force.

据报道，面临工资停滞的中国年轻消费者正在斥巨资购买“感觉”，从而推动新的经济趋势。这包括购买“伤感的玩具精灵”等商品以及开发机器人警察部队。

Tags: china economy · consumer spending · robotics · market trends
